cross_sector_diagnostics_recorded.note: 12-name basket A7 3.92 (vs 3-name 2.09) confirms the expanded universe's stronger diversification; not the risk axis but supportive.

lessons_eligible_for_lessons_md_in_a_sep: LESSON_S16_D1_001 (eligible; NOT written): After two mean-reversion FAIL_SAFETY terminals on cash equity (s14/s15), a NON-mean-reversion trend family (Donchian breakout + trailing stop) produced a POSITIVE, cost-stress-surviving in-sample edge on a 12-name basket. Changing the mechanic FAMILY (not iterating exits on the failed family) was the productive move (validates LESSON_S15_D1_003).

LESSON_S16_D1_002 (eligible; NOT written): Expanding the universe from 3 to 12 names resolved the trend K9-OOS reachability blocker (trend on 3 names ~6-24/y << 50/y; on 12 names ~65/y observed at IS) WITHOUT changing the mechanic family. Universe breadth is a lever for K9 reachability of low-frequency mechanics.

LESSON_S16_D1_003 (eligible; NOT written): The trend payoff geometry (win 34.67% / P/L 2.22) is the exact mirror of the failed mean-reversion geometry (win >50% / P/L <1); win rate alone is not edge, and a sub-50% win rate with P/L>1 is the trend-following signature.

WARNING (eligible; NOT written): a positive IS edge that survives cost-stress is necessary but NOT sufficient for OOS/live; lessons would be written only under separate authorization. This P7 does NOT touch lessons.md.

inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the 12-name basket (expected ~96-180/y). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.

EXIT/STOP-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING; trend variant): exit = TRAILING DONCHIAN channel (N_exit=10; let winners run/cut losers) + 2xATR(14) initial catastrophe stop. Opposite geometry to the failed mean-reversion family; expected trend profile win<50% / P/L>1. Hypothesis tested at P6 IS, never assumed.

trend_thesis_validated_at_IS.expected_trend_profile: win<50% but P/L>1 (few large winners pay for many small losers)
trend_thesis_validated_at_IS.interpretation: The first-principles trend hypothesis held textbook-style at IS: the trailing Donchian exit let winners run (181 trailing exits vs 136 initial-stop) and the payoff geometry is the MIRROR of the s14/s15 mean-reversion failure (win>50%/P/L<1). This is the family-level fix working: where mean-reversion edge was structurally absent on cash equity, trend edge is present on the 12-name basket over 2019-2023 IS.
trend_thesis_validated_at_IS.observed: win rate 34.67% with P/L ratio 2.2191 (avg win $1012.57 / avg loss $-456.3)

verdict_drivers.rule: edge survives full cost-stress S0-S4 (no DR3/DR5; DR10 v2 clears; K1/K2/K4 hold)

what_remains_unproven_explicit: OOS performance is NOT established (OOS rows never inspected; P10 is a separate authorization).
READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST does NOT imply OOS-confirmed, money-proven, paper-ready, or live-ready.

REC1-equivalent (BINDING): if observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed OR OOS K9 fires, the OOS verdict shall be PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE; the chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS (IS rate ~65/y is comfortably above the 25/y critical floor, so OOS K9 unreachability is NOT expected, but the disclosure remains binding).

Trend edges are regime-dependent: a strong 2019-2023 large-cap uptrend in-sample does NOT guarantee the 2024-2025 OOS window trends; DR4 (oos_negative_while_is_positive) is the canonical OOS risk and is evaluated only at P10.
6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
